topic: The unsettling case of Gursimran Kaur (2024): 19 year old gi.

framework.structure: ['The [specific place/object/event] that'] + [Mundane description] + ['is actually hiding'] + [Forbidden or suppressed truth]
framework.trigger: Hidden reality — the world has a concealed layer that almost nobody sees
framework.example: The town in Norway where it is illegal to die is not a tourist quirk. It is covering up something much stranger.

script.hook: The town in Norway where it is illegal to die is not a tourist quirk. It is covering up something much stranger.
script.body: Scientists have no explanation. The data exists, but the answer was never found.

full_script_text: The town in Norway where it is illegal to die is not a tourist quirk. It is covering up something much stranger. Scientists have no explanation. The data exists, but the answer was never found. What do you think?

visual_direction.kling_prompt: deep space starfield or abandoned corridor, eerie dim lighting, fog effect, no people, 9:16 vertical cinematic, horror atmospheric, unsettling stillness
